items.title_en: France suffers major power outage as Europe sizzles in record-breaking heat
items.title_zh: 欧洲遭遇创纪录高温，法国遭遇严重停电
items.desc_en: A heat-related power outage left around 68,000 homes without electricity in western France as record-breaking heat sweeps Europe.
items.desc_zh: 创纪录的高温席卷欧洲，导致法国西部约 68,000 户家庭停电。

items.title_en: BlackBerry has morphed into a 'mission critical' player in tech, making it a buy, says Stifel
items.title_zh: Stifel 表示，黑莓已成为科技领域的“关键任务”玩家，因此值得买入
items.desc_en: The investment firm initiated coverage of BlackBerry with a buy rating.
items.desc_zh: 该投资公司首次对黑莓给予买入评级。

items.title_en: Stock futures are mixed ahead of Micron earnings; tech stocks rebound after sell-off: Live updates
items.title_zh: 在美光公布财报之前，股票期货涨跌互现；科技股抛售后反弹：实时更新
items.desc_en: Memory stocks rose in premarket trading Wednesday, as U.S. stock futures were mixed ahead of the opening bell.
items.desc_zh: 由于美国股指期货在开盘前涨跌互现，存储器股在周三盘前交易中上涨。

items.title_en: France confirms first Ebola case
items.title_zh: 法国确认首例埃博拉病例
items.desc_en: More than 260 people in the Democratic Republic of Congo are known to have died during the current outbreak.
items.desc_zh: 据了解，刚果民主共和国已有 260 多人在此次疫情中死亡。

items.title_en: Tech companies would have to pay AI data center energy costs under bill moving in Congress
items.title_zh: 根据国会提出的法案，科技公司必须支付人工智能数据中心的能源成本
items.desc_en: A House subcommittee may advance legislation Wednesday to make tech companies pay the energy costs for operating data centers to power AI.
items.desc_zh: 众议院小组委员会可能会在周三推进立法，要求科技公司支付运营数据中心以支持人工智能的能源成本。

items.title_en: Ukraine strikes knock out power in key city in Russian-occupied Crimea
items.title_zh: 乌克兰空袭摧毁了俄罗斯占领的克里米亚主要城市的电力
items.desc_en: Sevastopol's Moscow-installed governor warns there will be no electricity in some areas until the evening.
items.desc_zh: 塞瓦斯托波尔在莫斯科任命的州长警告说，一些地区直到晚上才会停电。

items.title_en: France braces for another day of sweltering heat as Europe heatwave spreads
items.title_zh: 随着欧洲热浪蔓延，法国准备迎接又一天的酷暑
items.desc_en: The heatwave is expected to spread to other parts of western Europe on Wednesday, before extending eastwards over the weekend.
items.desc_zh: 预计热浪将于周三蔓延至西欧其他地区，然后在周末向东延伸。

items.title_en: Defense stocks plummet on report Germany is scrapping warships; Rheinmetall stock down 13%
items.title_zh: 有报道称德国正在报废军舰，国防股暴跌；莱茵金属股价下跌13%
items.desc_en: Berlin is planning to scrap a multi-billion-euro project to build the F126 frigates, according to the Financial Times.
items.desc_zh: 据英国《金融时报》报道，柏林正计划取消一项耗资数十亿欧元的 F126 护卫舰建造项目。

items.title_en: French woman allegedly held captive by husband for 12 years rescued in Pakistan
items.title_zh: 法国女子据称被丈夫囚禁12年在巴基斯坦获救
items.desc_en: Yasmina alleges she was held along with her five children, and they were all cut off from the outside world.
items.desc_zh: 亚斯米娜声称，她和五个孩子一起被关押，他们都与外界隔绝。

items.title_en: Kenya to charge students with murder over deadly school fire

items.desc_en: Sixteen pupils, aged between 15 and 18, died when a fire broke out in a dormitory at Utumishi Girls' School last month.
items.desc_zh: 上个月，Utumishi 女子学校的宿舍发生火灾，造成 16 名年龄在 15 岁至 18 岁之间的学生死亡。

items.desc_en: We're at one of Europe's biggest tech events.
items.desc_zh: 我们正在参加欧洲最大的科技活动之一。

items.title_en: SpaceX raises $25 billion in debt sale less than two weeks after IPO
items.title_zh: IPO后不到两周，SpaceX通过发债筹集了250亿美元
items.desc_en: SpaceX raised $25 billion in a debt sale, after seeing nearly $90 billion worth of orders, sources say.
items.desc_zh: 消息人士称，在接到价值近 900 亿美元的订单后，SpaceX 通过发债筹集了 250 亿美元。

items.title_en: PGA Tour CEO Brian Rolapp unveils sweeping changes to professional golf
items.title_zh: 美巡赛首席执行官布莱恩·罗拉普 (Brian Rolapp) 公布了职业高尔夫的彻底变革
items.desc_en: Changes to the PGA Tour are designed to elevate competition and raise payouts for winners.
items.desc_zh: 美巡赛的变化旨在提升竞争并提高获胜者的奖金。

items.title_en: Meta halts worker tracking for AI training due to privacy fears
items.title_zh: 由于担心隐私问题，Meta 停止追踪人工智能培训的员工
items.desc_en: The company had started just two months ago tracking workers’ computer usage for AI training data.
items.desc_zh: 该公司两个月前才开始跟踪员工的计算机使用情况以获取人工智能培训数据。

items.title_en: Israeli troops kill two in south Lebanon after lull in fighting, authorities say
items.title_zh: 当局称，以色列军队在战斗平息后在黎巴嫩南部打死两人
items.desc_en: Israel's military says the two men were Hezbollah operatives, but the Iran-backed group accuses it of a ceasefire violation.
items.desc_zh: 以色列军方称这两人是真主党特工，但伊朗支持的组织指责其违反停火协议。

items.title_en: Dozens of ships head through Strait of Hormuz after US-Iran deal
items.title_zh: 美伊达成协议后数十艘船只驶过霍尔木兹海峡
items.desc_en: Traffic in the waterway has risen since the US and Iran signed a deal aimed at ending the war, including 42 ships on Saturday alone.
items.desc_zh: 自美国和伊朗签署旨在结束战争的协议以来，该水道的交通量有所增加，仅周六就有 42 艘船只。

items.title_en: Steam Machine launches with £879 price tag as Valve cites component costs
items.title_zh: Valve 称 Steam Machine 的组件成本为 879 英镑
items.desc_en: Valve said the cost of its PC-console hybrid reflects a broader trend of component costs rising over time.
items.desc_zh: Valve表示，其PC-控制台混合体的成本反映了组件成本随着时间的推移而上升的更广泛趋势。

items.title_zh: Nimt

items.desc_zh: 您在 Slack 中的 AI 搜索同事

items.title_zh: React UI Kit V7

items.desc_zh: 当 PR 堆积时，你的菜单栏会变成红色

items.title_en: How 100 hospitals switched to pen and paper to defeat a national cyber-attack
items.title_zh: 100 家医院如何改用笔和纸来抵御全国性网络攻击
items.desc_en: For four days, dozens of Romanian hospitals went offline, as cyber-experts sought to defeat the hackers.
items.desc_zh: 四天内，数十家罗马尼亚医院关闭，网络专家试图击败黑客。

items.title_en: Millions in UK could claim share of £3bn after Apple case given green light
items.title_zh: 苹果案获得批准后，英国数百万人可索赔 30 亿英镑
items.desc_en: Apple rejected the suggestion its practices are anti-competitive, saying many customers rely on third-party alternatives.
items.desc_zh: 苹果否认了其做法反竞争的说法，称许多客户依赖第三方替代品。

items.title_en: Do you know your 'sweat score'? The rise of hydration tech
items.title_zh: 你知道你的“汗水分数”吗？补水技术的兴起
items.desc_en: Hydration tracking gadgets are flooding the market but is it too much information?
items.desc_zh: 水分追踪设备充斥市场，但信息量是否太多？

items.title_en: WhatsApp to be led by Indian start-up founder as Will Cathcart steps back
items.title_zh: Will Cathcart 退出后 WhatsApp 将由印度初创公司创始人领导
items.desc_en: WhatsApp's leadership shake-up comes as Meta looks to strengthen its app's already booming presence in India.
items.desc_zh: WhatsApp 领导层变动之际，Meta 希望加强其应用程序在印度已经蓬勃发展的影响力。

items.title_zh: Stripe.Directory

items.title_en: It's not just about nudity warns actress - the complex reality of images and online abuse
items.title_zh: 女演员警告说，这不仅仅是裸体问题 - 图像和网络虐待的复杂现实
items.desc_en: Tech companies and authorities are failing women by focusing on nudity rather than consent, says a report by Chayn.
items.desc_zh: 查恩的一份报告称，科技公司和当局关注裸体而不是同意，从而辜负了女性的期望。

items.title_en: Why an AI company cleaned my New York City apartment for free
items.title_zh: 为什么人工智能公司免费清洁我的纽约公寓
items.desc_en: An AI company is sending free cleaners door-to-door in a bid to train the robots it hopes one day will replace them.
items.desc_zh: 一家人工智能公司正在派免费清洁工挨家挨户培训机器人，希望有一天能够取代他们。

items.title_en: How the social media ban could reshape how all of us use the internet
items.title_zh: 社交媒体禁令如何重塑我们所有人使用互联网的方式
items.desc_en: Why some argue the social media ban could have a profound affect on how young people gain new knowledge and the rest of us move around online
items.desc_zh: 为什么有些人认为社交媒体禁令可能会对年轻人获取新知识以及我们其他人在网上活动的方式产生深远影响

items.title_zh: Thumbmagic
items.desc_en: AI thumbnail generator trained on top-performing thumbnails
items.desc_zh: 经过顶级性能缩略图训练的人工智能缩略图生成器

items.title_en: New video game console aims to get kids moving
items.title_zh: 新视频游戏机旨在让孩子们动起来
items.desc_en: The Nex Playground will cost £269 (€319) when it is released on 22 June in the UK and Ireland.
items.desc_zh: Nex Playground 将于 6 月 22 日在英国和爱尔兰发售，售价为 269 英镑（319 欧元）。

items.title_en: UK's top data and AI regulator quits after 'inappropriate' humour
items.title_zh: 英国最高数据和人工智能监管机构因“不当”幽默而辞职
items.desc_en: Edwards has been the boss of the data watchdog since January 2022, and said he had made inappropriate attempts at humour.
items.desc_zh: 爱德华兹自 2022 年 1 月起一直担任数据监管机构的老板，并表示他在幽默方面做出了不恰当的尝试。

items.title_zh: GTA 6 - 关于 Rockstar 的热门游戏您需要了解的一切
items.desc_en: Rockstar's sixth game in the franchise is set to be the biggest game release of the year.
items.desc_zh: Rockstar 系列的第六款游戏将成为今年发行量最大的游戏。
